response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year experience minimum, the role requires director-level strategic AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms. The resume shows solid general engineering craftsmanship but minimal AI/ML background—current exposure to MCP and AI infrastructure is very recent (2+ months) and insufficient for a principal-level strategy position. Additionally, a significant identity discrepancy between the name and contact information raises resume authenticity concerns.
strengths: Solid engineering foundation across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Entrepreneurial experience founding and maintaining GISCollective platform
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, products, or recognized standing in AI field
No director-level or principal-level IC experience; resume shows senior/staff roles only
Resume identity mismatch (name vs. contact email/GitHub) and chronological inconsistencies raise authenticity questions
